mapper.insert: /* 계측데이터 저장 : collectMapper.upsertTagData */ insert into msrm_l (tag_sn, msrm_dttm, msrm_val, rgst_id, rgst_dttm, mdf_id, mdf_dttm) values (#{tagSn}, #{msrmDttm}, #{msrmVal}, #{rgstId}, #{rgstDttm}, #{mdfId}, #{mdfDttm}) on conflict (tag_sn, msrm_dttm) do update set mdf_id = excluded.mdf_id , mdf_dttm = excluded.mdf_dttm , msrm_val = excluded.msrm_val
